nm:output.nm:control_stream: $PROBLEM RcppNM bench adv12_trans4 ADVAN=12 TRANS=4 $SUBROUTINE ADVAN12 TRANS4 $INPUT ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II $DATA design.csv IGNORE=@ $THETA (0.1, 1, 10) ; CL (1, 10, 100) ; VC (2, 20, 200) ; VP (0.2, 2, 20) ; Q2 (4, 40, 400) ; VP2 (0.1, 1, 10) ; Q3 (0.08, 0.8, 8) ; KA $OMEGA 0.09 0.09 0.09 $SIGMA 0.1 0.5 $PK CL = THETA(1) * exp(ETA(1)) VC = THETA(2) * exp(ETA(2)) VP = THETA(3) Q2 = THETA(4) VP2 = THETA(5) Q3 = THETA(6) KA = THETA(7) * exp(ETA(3)) V2 = VC V3 = VP V4 = VP2 Q = Q2 Q4 = Q3 S1 = 1 S2 = V2 S3 = V3 S4 = V4 $ERROR Y = F * (1 + ERR(1)) + ERR(2) $SIM (2024 NEW) ONLYSIM $TABLE ID TIME DV PRED MDV EVID CMT SS II ONEHEADER NOPRINT NOAPPEND FILE=simtab_full
nm:output.nm:nmtran:
WARNINGS AND ERRORS (IF ANY) FOR PROBLEM 1
(WARNING 2) NM-TRAN INFERS THAT THE DATA ARE POPULATION.

nm:nonmem.nm:license_information: License Registered to: Leiden Academic Center for Drug Research Expiration Date: 14 JAN 2028 Current Date: 25 JUN 2026 Days until program expires : 569
nm:nonmem.nm:program_information: 1NONLINEAR MIXED EFFECTS MODEL PROGRAM (NONMEM) VERSION 7.3.0 ORIGINALLY DEVELOPED BY STUART BEAL, LEWIS SHEINER, AND ALISON BOECKMANN CURRENT DEVELOPERS ARE ROBERT BAUER, ICON DEVELOPMENT SOLUTIONS, AND ALISON BOECKMANN. IMPLEMENTATION, EFFICIENCY, AND STANDARDIZATION PERFORMED BY NOUS INFOSYSTEMS.

nm:problem.nm:problem_information:
PROBLEM NO.: 1 RcppNM bench adv12_trans4 ADVAN=12 TRANS=4 0DATA CHECKOUT RUN: NO DATA SET LOCATED ON UNIT NO.: 2 THIS UNIT TO BE REWOUND: NO NO. OF DATA RECS IN DATA SET: 70 NO. OF DATA ITEMS IN DATA SET: 9 ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 1 DEP VARIABLE IS DATA ITEM NO.: 3 MDV DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 5 0INDICES PASSED TO SUBROUTINE PRED: 6 2 4 0 8 9 7 0 0 0 0 0LABELS FOR DATA ITEMS: ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II 0FORMAT FOR DATA: (9E5.0)
TOT. NO. OF OBS RECS: 62 TOT. NO. OF INDIVIDUALS: 6 0LENGTH OF THETA: 7 0DEFAULT THETA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0OMEGA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 3 0DEFAULT OMEGA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0SIGMA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 2 0DEFAULT SIGMA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF THETA: LOWER BOUND INITIAL EST UPPER BOUND 0.1000E+00 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0.1000E+03 0.2000E+01 0.2000E+02 0.2000E+03 0.2000E+00 0.2000E+01 0.2000E+02 0.4000E+01 0.4000E+02 0.4000E+03 0.1000E+00 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0.8000E-01 0.8000E+00 0.8000E+01 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF OMEGA: 0.9000E-01 0.0000E+00 0.9000E-01 0.0000E+00 0.0000E+00 0.9000E-01 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF SIGMA: 0.1000E+00 0.0000E+00 0.5000E+00 0SIMULATION STEP OMITTED: NO OBJ FUNC EVALUATED: NO 0SIMULATION RANDOM METHOD SELECTED (RANMETHOD): DEFAULT SOURCE 1: SEED1: 2024 SEED2: 0 PSEUDO-NORMAL DIFFERENT ETA AND EPS WITH EACH CALL TO SIMETA AND SIMEPS 0TABLES STEP OMITTED: NO NO. OF TABLES: 1 SEED NUMBER (SEED): 11456 RANMETHOD: MC SAMPLES (ESEED): 300 WRES SQUARE ROOT TYPE: EIGENVALUE 0-- TABLE 1 -- 04 COLUMNS APPENDED: NO PRINTED: NO HEADER: YES FILE TO BE FORWARDED: NO FORMAT: S1PE11.4 LFORMAT: RFORMAT: 0USER-CHOSEN ITEMS: ID TIME DV PRED MDV EVID CMT SS II 1DOUBLE PRECISION PREDPP VERSION 7.3.0
THREE COMPARTMENT MODEL WITH FIRST-ORDER ABSORPTION (ADVAN12) 0MAXIMUM NO. OF BASIC PK PARAMETERS: 7 0BASIC PK PARAMETERS (AFTER TRANSLATION): BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 1: ELIMINATION RATE (K) BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 2: CENTRAL-TO-PERIPH1 RATE (K23) BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 3: PERIPH1-TO-CENTRAL RATE (K32) BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 4: CENTRAL-TO-PERIPH2 RATE (K24) BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 5: PERIPH2-TO-CENTRAL RATE (K42) BASIC PK PARAMETER NO. 7: ABSORPTION RATE (KA) TRANSLATOR WILL CONVERT PARAMETERS CL, V2, Q3, V3, Q4, V4 TO K, K23, K32, K24, K42 (TRANS4) 0COMPARTMENT ATTRIBUTES COMPT. NO. FUNCTION INITIAL ON/OFF DOSE DEFAULT DEFAULT STATUS ALLOWED ALLOWED FOR DOSE FOR OBS. 1 DEPOT OFF YES YES YES NO 2 CENTRAL ON NO YES NO YES 3 PERIPH1 ON NO YES NO NO 4 PERIPH2 ON NO YES NO NO 5 OUTPUT OFF YES NO NO NO 1 ADDITIONAL PK PARAMETERS - ASSIGNMENT OF ROWS IN GG COMPT. NO. INDICES SCALE BIOAVAIL. ZERO-ORDER ZERO-ORDER ABSORB FRACTION RATE DURATION LAG 1 8 * * * * 2 9 * * * * 3 10 * * * * 4 11 * * * * 5 * - - - - - PARAMETER IS NOT ALLOWED FOR THIS MODEL * PARAMETER IS NOT SUPPLIED BY PK SUBROUTINE; WILL DEFAULT TO ONE IF APPLICABLE 0DATA ITEM INDICES USED BY PRED ARE: EVENT ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 6 TIME DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 2 DOSE AMOUNT DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 4 STEADY STATE DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 8 INTERVAL DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 9 COMPT. NO. DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 7
0PK SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD. PK SUBROUTINE NOT CALLED AT NONEVENT (ADDITIONAL OR LAGGED) DOSE TIMES. 0ERROR SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD.
